summary: Dashboard DnD (Drag-and-Drop) Widget Reordering Testing Complete. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI elements verified working: Edit mode button, banner, drag handles, sortable widgets, and config modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard DnD functionality fully verified. @dnd-kit integration working. All data-testids functional: btn-edit-mode, edit-mode-banner, btn-config-dashboard, sortable-widget-{id}, drag-handle-{id}. Config modal shows all 12 widgets with visibility toggles and up/down arrows.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/dashboard/config: PASSED - Returns user config with widgets array and available_widgets
backend_endpoints.POST /api/dashboard/config: PASSED - Saves widget order and visibility, persists to user document
backend_endpoints.GET /api/dashboard/kpis: PASSED - Returns all dashboard KPIs data

edit_mode_banner.status: PASSED - Shows 'Arrastra los widgets para reordenarlos. Pulsa Listo cuando termines.'

drag_handles.status: PASSED - 12 drag handles visible in edit mode

config_modal.status: PASSED - Shows all widgets with visibility toggles and up/down arrows

dashboard_widgets_rendered: kpis_principales - KPIs grid with contracts, parcels, surface, treatments, production, income, costs, margin
productividad - Análisis de Productividad with rendimiento, coste/ha, ingresos/ha, margen/ha
centro_exportacion - Export center with module checkboxes and Excel/PDF buttons
alertas_avisos - Alerts widget showing ITV and Mantenimiento alerts
resumen_fincas - Fincas summary with chart by provincia
graficos_cultivos - Charts for surface by crop and cost distribution
actividad_reciente - Recent activity and notifications panel

playwright_tests.dashboard_loads: PASSED - Dashboard page loads with all widgets
playwright_tests.edit_mode_toggle: PASSED - Button toggles edit mode on/off
playwright_tests.drag_handles_visible: PASSED - 12 drag handles visible in edit mode
playwright_tests.sortable_widgets: PASSED - 12 sortable widgets with correct data-testids
playwright_tests.config_modal: PASSED - Modal opens with widget list, toggles, and arrows

components.Dashboard.js: DndContext, SortableContext with verticalListSortingStrategy, handleDragEnd callback
components.SortableDashboardWidget.js: useSortable hook, drag handle with GripVertical icon, dashed border in edit mode

dnd_implementation_details.auto_save: Widget order auto-saves to backend on drag end via POST /api/dashboard/config
